content_blocks.text:
प्रोक्तप्रकारप्रबलान्विता ये मूलंगतास्ते विबला भवन्ति ।
भावेषु योगेषु दशाफलेषु न सम्यगुक्तानि फलानि सन्ति ॥६९॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
प्रोक्तप्रकारप्रबलान्विता ये मूलंगतास्ते विबला भवन्ति ।
भावेषु योगेषु दशाफलेषु न सम्यगुक्तानि फलानि सन्ति ॥६९॥
verse_data.topic: Planets becoming weak in the initial portion of a Bhava

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 69. Those planets which possess the strength described above become unavailing when they happen to be in the initial portion of a भाव-bhava or house as ascertained by भावस्फुट-bhava sphuta (correct calculations). Accordingly, none of the effects already described in so far as they relate to Bhavas, yogas and the various fortunes of a person's life can be expected to hold good in this case.

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 69. Those planets which possess the strength described above become unavailing when they happen to be in the initial portion of a भाव-bhava or house as ascertained by भावस्फुट-bhava sphuta (correct calculations). Accordingly, none of the effects already described in so far as they relate to Bhavas, yogas and the various fortunes of a person's life can be expected to hold good in this case.
verse_data.topic: Planets becoming weak in the initial portion of a Bhava

content_blocks.text: N. B. This interpretation is only tentative V. S.

अधोमुखा दिनेशस्य पूर्वषट्स्थिता ग्रहाः ।
अपरार्द्धस्थिता भानोरूर्ध्वाःस्युः सुखवित्तदाः ॥ ७० ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
अधोमुखा दिनेशस्य पूर्वषट्स्थिता ग्रहाः ।
अपरार्द्धस्थिता भानोरूर्ध्वाःस्युः सुखवित्तदाः ॥ ७० ॥
verse_data.topic: Prone and Supine planets relative to the Sun

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 70. Planets in the six signs before the Sun are called Prone: Those in the six behind the Sun are supine and are productive of happiness and wealth.

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 70. Planets in the six signs before the Sun are called Prone: Those in the six behind the Sun are supine and are productive of happiness and wealth.
verse_data.topic: Prone and Supine planets relative to the Sun

content_blocks.text:
मानामवस्थानगताः क्रमेण मन्दार्यभौमार्कसितज्ञचन्द्राः ।
तेषामधःस्थानगतो बलीयान् राहुर्महीमण्डलमूर्ध्नि संस्थः ॥ ७१ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मानामवस्थानगताः क्रमेण मन्दार्यभौमार्कसितज्ञचन्द्राः ।
तेषामधःस्थानगतो बलीयान् राहुर्महीमण्डलमूर्ध्नि संस्थः ॥ ७१ ॥
verse_data.topic: Planetary order and strength of Rahu

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 71. Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, the Sun, Venus, Mercury and the Moon are the planets arranged seriatim according to the length of the time they abide in the zodiacal signs. Rahu whose position is at the topmost point of the Earth's orbit (ascending node) has predominating strength when he occupies a position below the planets above-mentioned i. e. when he is before or to the east of them

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 71. Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, the Sun, Venus, Mercury and the Moon are the planets arranged seriatim according to the length of the time they abide in the zodiacal signs. Rahu whose position is at the topmost point of the Earth's orbit (ascending node) has predominating strength when he occupies a position below the planets above-mentioned i. e. when he is before or to the east of them
verse_data.topic: Planetary order and strength of Rahu

content_blocks.text:
सभानुरिंदुः शशिजश्चतुर्थे गुरुः सुते भूमिसुतः कुटुंबे ।
भृगुः सपत्ने रविजः कलत्रे विलग्नतस्ते विफला भवन्ति ॥७२॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
सभानुरिंदुः शशिजश्चतुर्थे गुरुः सुते भूमिसुतः कुटुंबे ।
भृगुः सपत्ने रविजः कलत्रे विलग्नतस्ते विफला भवन्ति ॥७२॥
verse_data.topic: Planets becoming ineffective based on house placement from Lagna

raw_text:
S1. 69-72
द्वितीयोऽध्यायः
83
प्रोक्तप्रकारप्रवलान्त्रिता ये मूलंगतास्ते विवला भवन्ति ।
भावेषु योगेषु दशाफलेषु न सम्भयुक्तानि कहानि सन्ति ॥६९॥
Sloka. 69. Those planets which possess the
strength described above become unavailing when they
happen to be in the initial portion of a भाव-bhava or
house as ascertained by भावस्कुट bhava sphuta (correct cal.
culations). Accordingly, none of the effects already
described in so far as they relate to Bhavas, yogas and
the various fortunes of a person's life can be expected
to hold good in this case.
N. B. This interpretation is only tentative V. S.
अधोमुखा दिनेशस्य पूर्वष दुस्थिता ग्रहाः ।
अपरार्द्धस्थिता भानोरुधीःस्युः सुखत्तिदाः ॥ ७० ॥
Sloku. 70. Planets in the six signs before the Sun
are called Prone: Those in the six behind the Sun are
supine and are productive of happiness and wealth.
मानामवस्थानगताः क्रमेण मन्दार्य भौमार्कसितज्ञचन्द्राः ।
तेषामधश्थानगतो बलीयान् राहुर्महीमण्डलमूर्ध्नि संश्थः ॥ ७१ ॥
Sloka. 71. Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, the Sun, Venus,
Mercury and the Moon are the planets arranged seri
atim according to the length of the time they abide in
the zodiacal signs. Rahu whose position is at the
topmost point of the Earth's orbit (ascending node) has
predominating strength when he occupies a position
below the planets above-mentioned i. e. when he is be
fore or to the east of them
(This meaning is only tentative.)
सभानुरिंदुः शशिजश्चतुर्थे गुरुः सुते भूमिसुतः कुटुंबे ।
भुगुः सपत्ने रविजः कलत्रे विलनतस्ते विफला भवान्ते ॥७२॥
extraction_notes: The English translation for shloka 72 is missing from the page.; Minor OCR errors in Sanskrit text were corrected based on linguistic and astrological context.
